figures.caption: Figure 1: Comparison of StructKV with state-of-the-art methods. (a) Accuracy retention under varying KV cache budgets. StructKV (red line) demonstrates superior robustness, maintaining near-lossless performance even at extreme compression rates, whereas baselines suffer significant degradation. (b) A holistic comparison showing that StructKV effectively resolves the trilemma of prefill speed, decoding latency, and long-context accuracy.
Figure 4: Visualization of Dynamic Pivot Detection on Qwen-2.5-32B-Instruct.
Figure 8: Needle-in-a-Haystack results on LLaMA-3.1-8B-Instruct with 10% KV retention rate.
Figure 6: Decoupling Analysis: Computation vs. Memory Budget.

Figure 2: The Three-Phase Workflow of StructKV. Phase 1: The model processes full context while accumulating global centrality scores (Cglobal). Phase 2: The Auto-Detector triggers a structural phase transition. The context is filtered using Cglobal, decoupling the propagation budget (Rstruct) from the storage budget (RKV ). Phase 3: Deep layers operate on the reduced "structural skeleton" for maximum speed.
